freshness_decay_note: Scores use configurable freshness decay so older classified items have less influence than newer classified items.

high_severity_items.summary: The article analyzes the prolonged slowdown in US home sales due to the mortgage rate lock-in effect, where homeowners with low existing rates are reluctant to move. Sales remain 30% below normal, with gradual recovery expected over several years even if mortgage rates stay elevated.
